name: Create Empty Text File
description: Create untitled.txt in the selected folder.
script:
target="${1:-$PWD}"
if [ -f "$target" ]; then
  target="$(dirname "$target")"
fi

file="$target/untitled.txt"
i=1
while [ -e "$file" ]; do
  file="$target/untitled-$i.txt"
  i=$((i + 1))
done
: >"$file"
open -R "$file"
